config.script:
'------- nx support------- #include "50560" #include "50561" '------------------------------------------------------- ' external interface '------------------------------------------------------- function prepare_single_selection(byval iTypeId,byval strTitle, byval strWhere,byval strSearchField) prepare_automatic iTypeId,strTitle,strWhere,strSearchField set_options true,false end function
function prepare_multi_selection(byval iTypeId,byval strTitle, byval strWhere,byval strSearchField) prepare_automatic iTypeId,strTitle,strWhere,strSearchField set_options true,true end function
function prepare_automatic(byval iTypeId,byval strTitle, byval strWhere,byval strSearchField) '----------- create new context and make it current ----
g_oContextArray.add new cbrowsecontext g_iCurrentContext = g_oContextArray.count - 1
if strTitle = "" then dim pM60130LegacyInfo : set pM60130LegacyInfo = doc_.getmodule(60130)
if strTitle = "" then strTitle = pM60130LegacyInfo.TypeId2ChoiceObj(iTypeId) end if end if
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WILDREF_TYPE).addnew(0,-1).text = strTitle
#ifdef ENABLE_DB11 page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME).removeall if trans_.isvar(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) then if trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) <> "0" then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_ROW).hide = hideRowStatus(iTypeId,trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP)) createCheckBoxStatus trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) end if end if #endif
#ifdef _IOW page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC).removeall page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_ROW_PRAC).hide = (iTypeId <> TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK) if iTypeId = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK then createCheckBoxStatusPracownika end if #endif
set_title strTitle prepare_automatic = true
if prepare_searchtype_builder(iTypeId,strWhere,strSearchField) then exit function end if
if prepare_stock_builder(iTypeId,strSearchField,strWhere,strSearchField,"") then exit function end if prepare_automatic = false end function
function prepare_array_browser(byval iTypeId,byval strTitle,byval strHeader,_ byref oBOWIArray) g_oContextArray.add new cbrowsecontext g_iCurrentContext = g_oContextArray.count - 1 page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WILDREF_TYPE).addnew(0,-1).text = strTitle
set_title strTitle
dim pRB : set pRB = nx_.new_array_rb()
pRB.init iTypeId,strHeader,oBOWIArray
set_result_builder pRB prepare_array_browser = true end function
function switch_current_context(byval iIndex) g_iCurrentContext = iIndex end function
function run_browser() regenerate_body run_browser = page_.domodalauto() end function
function run_multi_browser() set run_multi_browser = nothing regenerate_body dim iResult : iResult = page_.domodalauto() if iResult = 0 then exit function end if set run_multi_browser = get_current_context().m_oResultSelection_IdObj_Array end function
function result_typeid_array() set result_typeid_array = get_current_context().m_oResultSelection_TypeId_Array end function
function result_typeid() result_typeid = get_current_context().m_iResultTypeId end function '------------------------------------------------------- function set_options(byval bGrouping,byval bMultiSel) get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper.init bGrouping
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GO_UP).hide = not bGrouping page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MULTISEL_ROW).hide = not bMultiSel page_.ctrl(CTRLID_WILDREF_ROW).hide = (g_oContextArray.count < 2)
if bMultiSel then get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.set_multi_selection_mode CTRLID_MULTISEL_HDLR if not get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB is nothing then get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB.set_multi_selection_mode CTRLID_MULTISEL_HDLR end if set_mode_open_object else set_mode_choose_and_return end if
'---- '---- domyslnie zablokuj dodawanie gdy nie mozna dodawac obiektow gdy nie ma typu '----
disable_addnew (get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid = 0) end function
#ifdef _IOW '--------------------------------------- 'tworzy checkboxy dla statusu pracownika '--------------------------------------- sub createCheckBoxStatusPracownika() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC).addnew(0,-1).text = "bez umowy zlecenia" page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC).addnew(0,-1).text = "z umową zlecenia" page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC).value = "10" end sub
'--------------------------------------------- 'tworzy dodatkowy where dla statusu pracownika '--------------------------------------------- function addStatusPracWhere(strQuery) : addStatusPracWhere = strQuery 'rozdzielenie zapytania w przypadku wystąpienia order by dim strQueryPart1: strQueryPart1 = "" dim strQueryPart2: strQueryPart2 = "" dim iPos: iPos = InStr(strQuery,"order by") if iPos > clng(0) then strQueryPart1 = Mid(strQuery,1,iPos-1) strQueryPart2 = Mid(strQuery,iPos) else strQueryPart1 = strQuery end if
dim strCheckValue: strCheckValue = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC).value
'bez umowy zlecenia if strCheckValue = "10" then strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " and eAktywny <> 3 " end if 'z umową zlecenia if strCheckValue = "01" then strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " and eAktywny = 3 " end if 'gdy odznaczone nic nie pokazuj if strCheckValue = "00" then strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " and (1=0) " end if
addStatusPracWhere = strQueryPart1 + " " + strQueryPart2 end function
'------------------------------------------ 'tworzy dodatkowy where dla indeksu klienta '------------------------------------------ function addIndeksWhere(strQuery, strPattern) : addIndeksWhere = strQuery 'rozdzielenie zapytania w przypadku wystąpienia order by dim strQueryPart1: strQueryPart1 = "" dim strQueryPart2: strQueryPart2 = "" dim iPos: iPos = InStr(strQuery,"order by") if iPos > clng(0) then strQueryPart1 = Mid(strQuery,1,iPos-1) strQueryPart2 = Mid(strQuery,iPos) else strQueryPart1 = strQuery end if
strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " or ((n5klient.strIndeks like '" + strPattern + "%') and eAktywny=1) "
addIndeksWhere = strQueryPart1 + " " + strQueryPart2 addIndeksWhere = Replace(addIndeksWhere,"like '","like '%") end function #endif
#ifdef ENABLE_DB11 'tworzy checkboxy dla statusów wyszukiwanych dokumentów sub createCheckBoxStatus(strRejestrType) dim strWhere : strWhere = getWhereStatus(strRejestrType) dim oCursor : set oCursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5DOKSTATUS, strWhere, "dcs_strNazwa", "" ) dim oStatus, strIdStat: strIdStat = "" for each oStatus in oCursor page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME).addnew(0,-1).text = oStatus.dcs_strNazwa strIdStat = strIdStat + cstr(oStatus.IdObj) + "," next page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME).addnew(0,-1).text = "bez statusu" 'usunięcie przecinka na końcu if Len(strIdStat) > clng(0) then strIdStat = Left(strIdStat,Len(strIdStat) - 1) end if get_current_context().m_strIdStatus = strIdStat end sub
'---------------------------------------------------------------- 'Ustala where dla statusu dokumentu w zależności od typu rejestru '---------------------------------------------------------------- function getWhereStatus(strRejestrType) : getWhereStatus = "" dim tab: tab = Split(strRejestrType,",") dim iter for iter = 0 to Ubound(tab) dim idPos : idPos = 0 select case clng(tab(iter)) case N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_WDT,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_EXP,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA,N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA 'sprzedaż idPos = 1 case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_EXP,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA_KOR,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA 'korekta sprzedaży idPos = 2 case N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK_RR,N5REJESTRDOK_WNT,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP,N5REJESTRDOK_IMPORT_USLUG 'zakup idPos = 3 case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_IMPORT_USLUG 'korekta zakupu idPos = 4 case N5REJESTRDOK_ZAP_OFERTOWE_OBCE idPos = 5 case N5REJESTRDOK_ZAP_OFERTOWE_WLASNE idPos = 6 case N5REJESTRDOK_OFERTY_OBCE idPos = 7 case N5REJESTRDOK_OFERTY_WLASNE idPos = 8 case N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_OBCE idPos = 9 case N5REJESTRDOK__ZAM_WLASNE idPos = 10 case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ idPos = 11 case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ idPos = 12 case N5REJESTRDOK__MM idPos = 13 case N5REJESTRDOK__MR 'MM- idPos = 14 case N5REJESTRDOK__MP 'MM+ idPos = 15 case N5REJESTRDOK__RW idPos = 16 case N5REJESTRDOK__PW idPos = 17 case N5REJESTRDOK__IR idPos = 18 case N5REJESTRDOK__IP idPos = 19 case N5REJESTRDOK__RP idPos = 20 case N5REJESTRDOK__PP idPos = 21 case N5REJESTRDOK__REALPROD idPos = 22 case N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY,N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY idPos = 23 case N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY,N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY idPos = 24 case N5REJESTRDOK_ZADANIA 'zadanie idPos = 25 end select getWhereStatus = getWhereStatus + "substring(dcs_strTypDok," + CStr(idPos) + ",1) = '1' or " next getWhereStatus = Left(getWhereStatus,Len(getWhereStatus) - 4) end function
'tworzy dodatkowy where dla statusów dokumentów function addStatusWhere(strQuery) : addStatusWhere = strQuery if get_current_context().m_strIdStatus <> "" then 'rozdzielenie zapytania w przypadku wystąpienia order by dim strQueryPart1: strQueryPart1 = "" dim strQueryPart2: strQueryPart2 = "" dim iPos: iPos = InStr(strQuery,"order by") if iPos > clng(0) then strQueryPart1 = Mid(strQuery,1,iPos-1) strQueryPart2 = Mid(strQuery,iPos) else strQueryPart1 = strQuery end if
dim strWhereID: strWhereID = "" dim tab: tab = Split(get_current_context().m_strIdStatus,",") dim strCtrlVal: strCtrlVal = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_STATUS_NAME).value dim iter for iter = 0 to UBound(tab) if Mid(strCtrlVal,iter+1,1) = "1" then strWhereID = strWhereID + tab(iter) + "," end if next if Len(strWhereID) > clng(0) then strWhereID = Left(strWhereID,Len(strWhereID)-1) end if
'budowanie where if strWhereID <> "" then strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " and (pDokStatus in (select idobj from n5dokstatus where idobj in (" + strWhereID + ")) or [%1])" else strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " and [%1]" end if
if Right(strCtrlVal,1) = "1" then strQueryPart1 = Replace(strQueryPart1,"[%1]","pDokStatus = 0") else strQueryPart1 = Replace(strQueryPart1,"or [%1]","") strQueryPart1 = Replace(strQueryPart1,"and [%1]","") end if if strQueryPart2 = "" then addStatusWhere = strQueryPart1 else addStatusWhere = strQueryPart1 + " " + strQueryPart2 end if end if end function
'pokazuje wiersz z checkboxami statusów tylko dla wybranych dokumentów function hideRowStatus(nTypeId,strRejestrType): hideRowStatus = true dim tab: tab = Split(strRejestrType,",") select case nTypeId case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE hideRowStatus = false case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG select case clng(tab(0)) case N5REJESTRDOK__PZ,N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__MM,N5REJESTRDOK__MR,N5REJESTRDOK__MP,N5REJESTRDOK__RW, _ N5REJESTRDOK__PW, N5REJESTRDOK__IR,N5REJESTRDOK__IP,N5REJESTRDOK__RP,N5REJESTRDOK__PP hideRowStatus = false end select case TYPEID_N5REALPROD hideRowStatus = false case TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC hideRowStatus = false case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE hideRowStatus = false end select end function #endif
function autorefresh(byval bEnable) g_bAutoRefresh = bEnable end function
function disable_addnew(byval bDisable) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ADDNEW).hide = bDisable end function
function set_title(byval strTitle) get_current_context().m_strTitle = strTitle end function
function set_mode_choose_and_return() set get_current_context().m_pOnChooseDelegate = getref("choose_and_return_delegate") end function
function set_mode_open_object() set get_current_context().m_pOnChooseDelegate = getref("open_object_delegate") end function
function set_custom_choose_delegate(byref pDelegate) set get_current_context().m_pOnChooseDelegate = pDelegate end function
function set_result_builder(byref pResultBuilder) set get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder = pResultBuilder end function
function set_custom_rowbuilder_delegate(byref pCustomRowBuilderDelegate) set get_current_context().m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate = pCustomRowBuilderDelegate end function
function set_loose_rb(byref oLooseRB) set get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB = oLooseRB end function '------------------------------------------------------- ' module internals '------------------------------------------------------- function fclose kill_timer #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "0" #endif end function
private function prepare_stock_builder(byval iTypeId, byval strSearchField, byval strWhere, byval strOrderBy, byval strJoin) dim pRB : set pRB = nx_.new_stock_rb() dim oNXObjDef : set oNXObjDef = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId) if strSearchField = "" then strSearchField = oNXObjDef.default_search_field.name end if dim strTitle : strTitle = oNXObjDef.fields.get_field(strSearchField).human_name pRB.init nx_.apprep,iTypeId,strTitle,oNXObjDef.table_name,strSearchField,strWhere,strOrderBy,strJoin set_result_builder pRB prepare_stock_builder = true end function
private function prepare_searchtype_builder(byval iTypeId, byval strWhere,byval strSearchField) prepare_searchtype_builder = false dim pM60115 : set pM60115 = doc_.getmodule(60115)
dim oRapDef : set oRapDef = pM60115.nx_lookup_raport_definition(iTypeId,"@browser_") if oRapDef is nothing then exit function end if
dim pRB : set pRB = nx_.new_searchtype_rb() dim strRowBuildingCode : strRowBuildingCode = pRB.init(nx_.apprep,oRapDef,strWhere,strSearchField,1) if len(strRowBuildingCode) <> 0 then
#ifdef _DEBUG dim pRBCS : set pRBCS = doc_.createstreamobj() pRBCS.write strRowBuildingCode pRBCS.save "c:\temp\nx_row_building_code.vbs" #endif
executeglobal strRowBuildingCode set get_current_context().m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate = _ getref("nx_dynamic_emit_body_row" + cstr(iTypeId))
end if
set_result_builder pRB
dim oLooseSearchRD : set oLooseSearchRD = pM60115.nx_lookup_raport_definition(iTypeId,"@fuzzy_")
if not (oLooseSearchRD is nothing) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MUTLICRITERIAL).hide = false 'cm_column_left + cm_order_left + cm_filter_right dim oComposedRD : set oComposedRD = nx_.compose_rapdef(oRapDef,oLooseSearchRD,2+4+16) dim pLooseRB : set pLooseRB = nx_.new_searchtype_rb() pLooseRB.init nx_.apprep,oComposedRD,strWhere,strSearchField,3 set_loose_rb pLooseRB
end if prepare_searchtype_builder = true end function
class cbrowsecontext public m_strPattern public m_pBrowserHelper public m_pOnChooseDelegate public m_pResultBuilder public m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate public m_strTitle public m_pLooseSearchRB public m_oBDA #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 'zmienna do przechowywania idobj statusów public m_strIdStatus #endif '------------------------------------------------------- ' przechowywanie wynikow '------------------------------------------------------- public m_iResultTypeId public m_iResultIdObj public m_oResultSelection_IdObj_Array public m_oResultSelection_TypeId_Array '------------------------------------------------------- private sub class_initialize() m_strPattern = "" set m_pBrowserHelper = nx_.new_browser() set m_pOnChooseDelegate = nothing set m_pResultBuilder = nothing m_iResultTypeId = clng(0) m_iResultIdObj = clng(0) set m_oResultSelection_IdObj_Array = nothing set m_oResultSelection_TypeId_Array = nothing set m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate = nothing m_strTitle = "Wybór z listy" set m_pLooseSearchRB = nothing set m_oBDA = nothing #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 m_strIdStatus = "" #endif end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pBrowserHelper = nothing set m_pOnChooseDelegate = nothing set m_pResultBuilder = nothing set m_oResultSelection_IdObj_Array = nothing set m_oResultSelection_TypeId_Array = nothing set m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate = nothing set m_pLooseSearchRB = nothing set m_oBDA = nothing end sub end class
dim g_oContextArray : set g_oContextArray = nx_.new_array() dim g_iCurrentContext : g_iCurrentContext = -1 dim g_pM60050 : set g_pM60050 = doc_.getmodule(60050) dim g_oEValuator : set g_oEValuator = g_pM60050.new_evaluator() dim g_bAutoRefresh : g_bAutoRefresh = true
function get_current_context() if g_iCurrentContext >= 0 then set get_current_context = g_oContextArray(g_iCurrentContext) else set get_current_context = nothing end if end function
'-------------------------------------------------------
function c##CTRLID_PATTERN##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_GO_UP).disable = get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper.is_pattern_stack_empty() end function
function c##CTRLID_PATTERN##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) get_current_context().m_strPattern = newValue
if g_bAutoRefresh then set_timer end if
c##CTRLID_PATTERN##_ondataentered=true end function
function c##CTRLID_MULTISEL_HDLR##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) dim bSelected: bSelected = get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper. _ get_item_selection(oCtrl.userprop.prop(GVAR_TYPEID),oCtrl.userprop.prop(GVAR_OBJECT)) if bSelected then oCtrl.value = "1" else oCtrl.value = "0" end if end function
function c##CTRLID_MULTISEL_HDLR##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) dim bSelected : bSelected = (newValue = "1") get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper.put_item_selection _ oCtrl.userprop.prop(GVAR_TYPEID),oCtrl.userprop.prop(GVAR_OBJECT),bSelected c##CTRLID_MULTISEL_HDLR##_ondataentered=true end function
function c##CTRLID_WILDREF_TYPE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = clng(g_iCurrentContext + 1) end function
function c##CTRLID_WILDREF_TYPE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_WILDREF_TYPE##_ondataentered = true if newValue <> g_iCurrentContext + 1 then switch_current_context newValue - 1 page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PATTERN).value = get_current_context().m_strPattern page_.ctrl(CTRLID_MUTLICRITERIAL).hide = (get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB is nothing) regenerate_body end if end function
#ifdef ENABLE_DB11 function c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) end function
function c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME##_ondataentered = true regenerate_body end function #endif
#ifdef _IOW function c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) end function
function c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c##CTRLID_STATUS_NAME_PRAC##_ondataentered = true regenerate_body end function #endif
private function set_timer doc_.timer 1213,"varFunctionHLI='regenerate_body_hli' gvar_page_iid='" + CStr(page_.iid) + "'",1 end function
private function kill_timer doc_.timer 1213,"",0 end function
'------------------------------------------------------- ' event handlers '------------------------------------------------------- function on_element_choose_hli(byref pHLI) if not get_current_context().m_pOnChooseDelegate is nothing then get_current_context().m_pOnChooseDelegate page_.get_this(),pHLI end if end function
'vs1 = new pattern function on_set_pattern_hli(byref pHLI) get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper.push_pattern get_current_context().m_strPattern
get_current_context().m_strPattern = nx_.convert.unescape_string(pHLI.prop(1)) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PATTERN).value = get_current_context().m_strPattern page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PATTERN).movecaretto len(get_current_context().m_strPattern),true regenerate_body end function
function on_go_up() get_current_context().m_strPattern = get_current_context().m_pBrowserHelper.pop_pattern() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PATTERN).value = get_current_context().m_strPattern regenerate_body end function
function on_addrecord() dim idNewObject : idNewObject = clng(0) dim oSubTrans : set oSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() trans_.var(GVAR_CURSOR) = clng(0) doc_.getmodule(60129).form_domodal get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid, idNewObject, USAGE_EDIT set oSubTrans = nothing
'check if exists dim pObject : set pObject = nothing on error resume next
set pObject = trans_.getobj(get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid,idNewObject) if pObject is nothing then exit function end if
page_.result = idNewObject get_current_context().m_iResultIdObj = idNewObject get_current_context().m_iResultTypeId = pObject.type page_.goback end function
function on_prev_page() dim oCurrCtxt : set oCurrCtxt = get_current_context() oCurrCtxt.m_pBrowserHelper.move_page_up page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULTS).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_RESULTS, nx_generate_body(oCurrCtxt.m_oBDA) end function
function on_next_page() dim oCurrCtxt : set oCurrCtxt = get_current_context() oCurrCtxt.m_pBrowserHelper.move_page_down page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULTS).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_RESULTS, nx_generate_body(oCurrCtxt.m_oBDA) end function
function on_multicriteriasearch() update_title kill_timer
'first try with ready to use BDA dim oBDA : set oBDA = get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB.create_actual_bda(get_current_context().m_strPattern)
'then with plain SQL if oBDA is nothing then dim strQuery : strQuery = get_current_context().m_pLooseSearchRB.build_actual_query(get_current_context().m_strPattern) dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors(strQuery) set oBDA = nx_.new_recordset_bda(pCursor) end if set get_current_context().m_oBDA = oBDA
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULTS).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_RESULTS, _ nx_generate_body_from_begin(oBDA,get_current_context().m_strPattern) end function
function on_cancel() page_.result = 0 get_current_context().m_iResultIdObj = 0 get_current_context().m_iResultTypeId = 0 page_.goback end function
function on_ok() page_.result = 1 with get_current_context() set .m_oResultSelection_IdObj_Array = _ .m_pBrowserHelper.get_selected_idobj_array() set .m_oResultSelection_TypeId_Array = _ .m_pBrowserHelper.get_selected_typeid_array() .m_iResultIdObj = 1 .m_iResultTypeId = .m_pResultBuilder.typeid end with page_.goback end function '------------------------------------------------------- '------------------------------------------------------- function update_title() page_.topelement.title = get_current_context().m_strTitle end function
function regenerate_body_hli(byref oHLI) regenerate_body end function
function regenerate_body() update_title kill_timer
'first try with ready to use BDA dim oBDA : set oBDA = get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.create_actual_bda(get_current_context().m_strPattern)
'then with plain SQL if oBDA is nothing then dim strQuery : strQuery = get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.build_actual_query(get_current_context().m_strPattern) #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 'dodanie do zapytania odpowiedniego where dla statusu dokumentu if trans_.isvar(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) then if trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) <> "0" then strQuery = addStatusWhere(strQuery) end if end if #endif #ifdef _IOW if get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK then strQuery = addStatusPracWhere(strQuery) end if if get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid = TYPEID_N5KLIENT then strQuery = addIndeksWhere(strQuery,get_current_context().m_strPattern) end if #endif #ifdef _ARTECH if get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.typeid = TYPEID_N5PRODUKT then strQuery = ProdIndeksWhere(strQuery,get_current_context().m_strPattern) end if #endif dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors(strQuery) set oBDA = nx_.new_recordset_bda(pCursor) end if set get_current_context().m_oBDA = oBDA
page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULTS).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_RESULTS, _ nx_generate_body_from_begin(oBDA,get_current_context().m_strPattern) end function
'------------------------------------------------------- ' delegates '------------------------------------------------------- function choose_and_return_delegate(byref pCallingPage,byref pHLI) pCallingPage.result = clng(pHLI.prop(GVAR_OBJECT)) get_current_context().m_iResultIdObj = clng(pHLI.prop(GVAR_OBJECT)) get_current_context().m_iResultTypeId = clng(pHLI.prop(GVAR_TYPEID)) pCallingPage.goback end function
function open_object_delegate(byref pCallingPage,byref pHLI) nx_fire_open_form_usage clng(pHLI.prop(GVAR_TYPEID)),clng(pHLI.prop(GVAR_OBJECT)),USAGE_VIEW end function
'------------------------------------------------------- function nx_generate_body_from_begin(byref oBDA, byval strCurrentPattern) dim oCurrCtxt : set oCurrCtxt = get_current_context() oCurrCtxt.m_pBrowserHelper.begin_requery oBDA,len(strCurrentPattern) set nx_generate_body_from_begin = nx_generate_body(oBDA) end function
function nx_generate_body(byref oBDA)
dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pNXAspator : set pNXAspator = nx_.new_aspator() with pNXAspator .init pStream .newtableex "" .newsection "thead",1 .newgroup 1,"" get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.emit_body_header pNXAspator
.newsectionex "tbody",1, "style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY'" .newgroup 1,"" dim oCurrCtxt : set oCurrCtxt = get_current_context()
dim bEven : bEven = false dim oInfoItem dim iLP dim iLimit : iLimit = 26 if get_current_context().m_pResultBuilder.is_multi_selection_mode() then iLimit = 20 end if for iLP = 1 to iLimit set oInfoItem = oCurrCtxt.m_pBrowserHelper.get_next() if oInfoItem is nothing then exit for end if
oCurrCtxt.m_pResultBuilder.emit_body_row pNXAspator,oInfoItem if (not oCurrCtxt.m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate is nothing) and oInfoItem.m_iCount = 0 then oCurrCtxt.m_pCustomRowBuilderDelegate pNXAspator,g_oEValuator,oInfoItem end if next page_.ctrl(CTRLID_NEXT_PAGE).disable = (oInfoItem is nothing) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PREV_PAGE).disable = (oCurrCtxt.m_pBrowserHelper.get_current_page() = 0) .flush end with #ifdef _DEBUG pStream.save "c:\temp\nx_generate_body.txt" #endif pStream.rewind set nx_generate_body = pStream end function
'------------------------------------------------------- ' generowanie wynikow w postaci tabelki ' eStyle '0 - bez kolorowania wierszy kolumn '1 - koloruj co 2-gi wiersz (typowo raporty) '2 - koloruj co 2-ga kolumna (typowo zakladki na kartach) ' '------------------------------------------------------- function nx_generate_table_result(byref oRapDef,byval iTop,byval strWhere,byval eStyle)
dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pNXAspator : set pNXAspator = nx_.new_aspator() dim oTableRB : set oTableRB = nx_.new_table_rb()
if eStyle = 2 then oTableRB.attrib_for_even_col = "style='STYLE_OPTION_PAD' border='0'" oTableRB.attrib_for_odd_col = "" oTableRB.attrib_for_odd_row = "border='0'" oTableRB.attrib_for_even_row = "border='0'" else if eStyle = 1 then oTableRB.attrib_for_even_row = "backcolor='#E6E6FA' bordercolor='#006697' border='1'" oTableRB.attrib_for_odd_row = "style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY'" end if end if
dim strRowBuildingCode : strRowBuildingCode = oTableRB.init(nx_.apprep,oRapDef,iTop,strWhere) executeglobal strRowBuildingCode dim pCustomRowBuilderDelegate set pCustomRowBuilderDelegate = getref("nx_dynamic_emit_body_row" + cstr(oRapDef.typeid))
with pNXAspator .init pStream .newtableex "" .newsection "thead",1 .newgroup 1,"" oTableRB.emit_body_header pNXAspator
.newsectionex "tbody",1, "" .newgroup 1,"" dim pCursor : set pCursor = trans_.createadors(oTableRB.get_query_text()) dim oRS_BDA : set oRS_BDA = nx_.new_recordset_bda(pCursor)
dim iLP : iLP = 1 dim bEven : bEven = false do while not oRS_BDA.EOF dim oInfoItem : set oInfoItem = nx_.rs2oi(oRS_BDA,oRapDef.get_record_identification_column_count()) #ifdef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY if InStr(oTableRB.get_query_text(),"n5zadanie.nStatus = 0") > 0 then if trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,clng(pCursor(0).value)).nStatus = N5ZADANIE_UTWORZONE then pNXAspator.newrowex("backcolor='#FADC6E' bordercolor='#006697' border='1'") else oTableRB.emit_body_row pNXAspator,oInfoItem end if else oTableRB.emit_body_row pNXAspator,oInfoItem end if #else oTableRB.emit_body_row pNXAspator,oInfoItem #endif pCustomRowBuilderDelegate pNXAspator,g_oEValuator,oInfoItem iLP = iLP + 1 oRS_BDA.MoveNext bEven = not bEven loop .flush end with #ifdef _DEBUG pStream.save "c:\temp\nx_generate_table_result.txt" pStream.rewind #endif set nx_generate_table_result = pStream end function
'---------------------------------------------------- 'tworzy dodatkowy where dla indeksu produktu (Artech) '---------------------------------------------------- function ProdIndeksWhere(strQuery, strPattern) : ProdIndeksWhere = strQuery if strPattern <> "" then 'rozdzielenie zapytania w przypadku wystąpienia order by dim strQueryPart1: strQueryPart1 = "" dim strQueryPart2: strQueryPart2 = "" dim iPos: iPos = InStr(strQuery,"order by") if iPos > clng(0) then strQueryPart1 = Mid(strQuery,1,iPos-1) strQueryPart2 = Mid(strQuery,iPos) else strQueryPart1 = strQuery end if
strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " or ((strIndeks like '" + Replace(Replace(strPattern,"-","")," ","") + "%') and eAktywny = 1) " strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " or ((strCecha1 like '" + Replace(Replace(strPattern,"-","")," ","") + "%') and eAktywny = 1) " strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " or ((strCecha2 like '" + Replace(Replace(strPattern,"-","")," ","") + "%') and eAktywny = 1) " strQueryPart1 = strQueryPart1 + " or ((strCecha3 like '" + Replace(Replace(strPattern,"-","")," ","") + "%') and eAktywny = 1) "
ProdIndeksWhere = strQueryPart1 + " " + strQueryPart2 end if end function

table.tbody:
Dodaj
<< >>
#ifdef ENABLE_DB11
#endif #ifdef _IOW
#endif
Wzorzec
Przeszukaj
OK Anuluj
